explore.title: Ab Toh Ghoom Le
explore.subtitle: Discover Your Next Adventure
explore.noTrips: No trips found matching your search.

tripDetails.manualConfirmHelp: Help: As UPI payments do not have automated callbacks, your booking will be marked as Pending. The vendor will manually verify your payment and confirm your seat.

vendor.apiKeyHelp: Help: To use AI Import, you need a free API key. Click "Get Key", sign in, generate a key, and paste it here. Your key is only used locally and never stored on our servers.
vendor.loginSubtitle: Sign in with Google to manage your trips and payment settings.

bookings.pleaseLogin: Please log in to view your bookings.
bookings.emptySubtitle: When you book a trip, it will appear here.

vendorLive.trackingHelp: Help: Keep the app open to continue broadcasting your location accurately. The trip will auto-complete 1 hour after crossing the final pickup point.

booking.subtitle: Your adventure is locked in. Get ready!
booking.pendingNote: Your payment is pending manual verification by the vendor.
booking.confirmedNote: Show this booking ID to your trip captain on departure day.
